category_sources: source_facts.description says ephemeralpg runs tests on isolated temporary Postgres databases; official GitHub README says Ephemeral PostgreSQL spins up temporary PostgreSQL test databases.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README titles the project Ephemeral PostgreSQL; source_facts.name is ephemeralpg.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page; official GitHub README documents installation and pg_tmp examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official project page and GitHub repository identify eradman/ephemeralpg as the source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe isolated temporary PostgreSQL databases for tests.
